scripts.build: bun run build:packages && bun run --cwd apps/site build && bun run --cwd apps/cloudflare typecheck && bun run --cwd apps/cloudflare-bridge typecheck && tsc -p examples/tsconfig.json
scripts.build:packages: bun run --cwd packages/core build && bun run --cwd packages/local build && bun run --cwd packages/ai build && bun run --cwd packages/vercel build && bun run --cwd packages/e2b build && bun run --cwd packages/daytona build && bun run --cwd packages/cloudflare build && bun run --cwd packages/modal build && bun run --cwd packages/blaxel build && bun run --cwd packages/codesandbox build
scripts.docs:api: bun run build:packages && bun scripts/api.ts && bun x oxfmt docs/api.md
scripts.pack:packages: bun run build:packages && for p in packages/core packages/local packages/ai packages/vercel packages/e2b packages/daytona packages/cloudflare packages/modal packages/blaxel packages/codesandbox; do (cd $p && bun pm pack --dry-run --ignore-scripts); done
scripts.test: bun run build:packages && bun test packages scripts test
scripts.verify: bun run test && bun run docs:api:check && bun run check && bun run typecheck && bun run pack:packages && bun run build
scripts.verify:providers: bun run verify:env && bun run build:packages && (bun --env-file=.env.local test --timeout=300000 packages/blaxel/test/live.test.ts packages/cloudflare/test/live.test.ts packages/daytona/test/live.test.ts packages/e2b/test/live.test.ts packages/modal/test/live.test.ts packages/vercel/test/live.test.ts; tests=$?; node --env-file=.env.local packages/codesandbox/test/live.mjs; codesandbox=$?; exit $((tests || codesandbox)))
scripts.verify:blaxel: bun --env-file=.env.local scripts/credentials.ts blaxel && bun run --cwd packages/blaxel build && bun --env-file=.env.local test --timeout=300000 packages/blaxel/test/live.test.ts
scripts.verify:cloudflare: bun --env-file=.env.local scripts/credentials.ts cloudflare && bun run --cwd packages/cloudflare build && bun --env-file=.env.local test --timeout=300000 packages/cloudflare/test/live.test.ts
scripts.verify:cloudflare:bridge: bun --env-file=.env.local scripts/credentials.ts cloudflare-bridge && bun run --cwd packages/cloudflare build && bun run --cwd apps/cloudflare-bridge typecheck && bun --env-file=.env.local test --timeout=300000 packages/cloudflare/test/bridge.live.test.ts
scripts.verify:codesandbox: bun --env-file=.env.local scripts/credentials.ts codesandbox && bun run --cwd packages/codesandbox build && node --env-file=.env.local packages/codesandbox/test/live.mjs
scripts.verify:daytona: bun --env-file=.env.local scripts/credentials.ts daytona && bun run --cwd packages/daytona build && bun --env-file=.env.local test --timeout=300000 packages/daytona/test/live.test.ts
scripts.verify:daytona:snapshot-delete: bun --env-file=.env.local scripts/credentials.ts daytona-snapshot-delete && bun run --cwd packages/daytona build && bun --env-file=.env.local test --timeout=300000 --test-name-pattern 'daytona deletes a durable snapshot' packages/daytona/test/live.test.ts
scripts.verify:e2b: bun --env-file=.env.local scripts/credentials.ts e2b && bun run --cwd packages/e2b build && bun --env-file=.env.local test --timeout=300000 packages/e2b/test/live.test.ts
scripts.verify:modal: bun --env-file=.env.local scripts/credentials.ts modal && bun run --cwd packages/modal build && bun --env-file=.env.local test --timeout=300000 packages/modal/test/live.test.ts
scripts.verify:vercel: bun --env-file=.env.local scripts/credentials.ts vercel && bun run --cwd packages/vercel build && bun --env-file=.env.local test --timeout=300000 packages/vercel/test/live.test.ts
scripts.typecheck: bun run build:packages && tsc -p packages/ai/test/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/cloudflare/test/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/vercel/test/tsconfig.json && bunx tsc -p scripts/tsconfig.json && bun run --cwd apps/site typecheck && bun run --cwd apps/cloudflare typecheck && bun run --cwd apps/cloudflare-bridge typecheck && tsc -p examples/tsconfig.json
